Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

import { getAllApplications } from "@/app/actions/recruitment" import { RecruitmentTable } from "./recruitment-table" import { InviteDialog } from "@/components/invite-dialog" import { Metadata } from "next" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" export const metadata: Metadata = { title: "Recruitment Pipeline | Admin", description: "Review and approve new agent applications.", } export default async function RecruitmentPage() { const applications = await getAllApplications() const pending = applications.filter((a: any) => a.status === "PENDING") const approved = applications.filter((a: any) => a.status === "APPROVED") const rejected = applications.filter((a: any) => a.status === "REJECTED") return (
{/* Header */}

Admin

Recruitment Pipeline

Review pending applications and generate invite links for new agents.

{/* Stats row */}

Pending

{pending.length}

Approved

{approved.length}

Rejected

{rejected.length}

) }

* Update external systems with the latest state from React.

"use client" import { useState, useEffect } from "react" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input" import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { approveApplication, rejectApplication } from "@/app/actions/recruitment" import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, } from "@/components/ui/dialog" import { Check, X, UserPlus, Link2, Loader2, User, Phone, Mail, MapPin } from "lucide-react" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" const ROLE_COLORS: Record = { SALESPERSON: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400", SALES_AGENT: "bg-violet-100 text-violet-700 dark:bg-violet-900/30 dark:text-violet-400", SUB_SALES_AGENT: "bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-600 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-400", } const STATUS_COLORS: Record = { PENDING: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-400", APPROVED: "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-400", REJECTED: "bg-red-100 text-red-600 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400", } export function RecruitmentTable({ applications }: { applications: any[] }) { const [selectedApp, setSelectedApp] = useState(null) const [isApproving, setIsApproving] = useState(false) const [isRejecting, setIsRejecting] = useState(null) const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false) const [defaultAgentCode, setDefaultAgentCode] = useState("") const [approveError, setApproveError] = useState(null) useEffect(() => { if (isOpen) { setDefaultAgentCode(`AGT-${Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000)}`) setApproveError(null) } }, [isOpen]) async function handleApprove(e: React.FormEvent) { e.preventDefault() setIsApproving(true) setApproveError(null) const formData = new FormData(e.currentTarget) formData.append("id", selectedApp.id) if (selectedApp.referrerId) formData.append("parentId", selectedApp.referrerId) const result = await approveApplication(formData) setIsApproving(false) if (result.error) { setApproveError(result.error as string) } else { setIsOpen(false) } } async function handleReject(id: string) { if (!confirm("Reject this application?")) return setIsRejecting(id) await rejectApplication(id, "Rejected by admin") setIsRejecting(null) } if (applications.length === 0) { return (

No Applications Yet

Generate an invite link and share it to start recruiting agents.

) } return ( <> {/* Mobile card list */}

All Applications ({applications.length})

{applications.map((app) => (
{/* Name + status */}
{app.name.charAt(0)}

{app.name}

{app.location || "—"}

{app.status}
{/* Details */}
{app.email}
{app.phone}
{/* Role + Source */}
{app.requestedRole.replace(/_/g, " ")} {app.inviteToken ? ( Via Invite Link ) : ( Direct Apply )}
{/* Referrer */} {app.referrer && (

Under: {app.referrer.name} ({app.referrer.agentCode})

)} {/* Actions */} {app.status === "PENDING" && (
)}
))}
{/* Desktop table */}
{applications.map((app) => ( ))}
Candidate Contact Role Source Status Applied Actions
{app.name.charAt(0)}

{app.name}

{app.location || "—"}

{app.email}

{app.phone}

 {app.requestedRole.replace(/_/g, " ")} {app.inviteToken ? ( Invite Link ) : ( Direct )} {app.referrer && (

Via {app.referrer.name}

)} 		{app.status} {new Date(app.createdAt).toLocaleDateString("en-IN", { day: "numeric", month: "short" })} {app.status === "PENDING" ? (
) : ( Processed )}
{/* Approve Dialog */} Confirm & Approve Agent {selectedApp && (
{/* Applicant info */}

{selectedApp.name}

{selectedApp.email} · {selectedApp.phone}

{selectedApp.referrer && (

Will report to: {selectedApp.referrer.name}

)}
{approveError && (
{approveError}
)}

🔑 A login account will be created with the temporary password solar123. The agent should change it on first login.

)} ) }

import { getAgentById } from "@/app/actions/agents" import { notFound } from "next/navigation" import Link from "next/link" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { ArrowLeft, Pencil, Users, Target, IndianRupee, ChevronRight, User, ShieldCheck } from "lucide-react" export default async function AgentDetailPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) { const { id } = await params const agent = await getAgentById(id) if (!agent) notFound() const totalCommission = agent.commissions.reduce((sum, c) => sum + Number(c.amount), 0) const typeColor: Record = { SALESPERSON: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400", SALES_AGENT: "bg-violet-100 text-violet-700 dark:bg-violet-900/30 dark:text-violet-400", SUB_SALES_AGENT: "bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-700 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-400", } return (
{/* ── App-style Header ── */}

{agent.name}

{agent.agentCode}

{agent.isActive ? "ACTIVE" : "INACTIVE"}
{/* ── Agent Profile Summary Card ── */}
{agent.name.charAt(0)}

{agent.name}

{agent.type.replace("_", " ")}

Earnings

₹{totalCommission.toLocaleString("en-IN")}

Rate

{agent.commissionType === "PERCENTAGE" ? `${Number(agent.commissionRate)}%` : `₹${Number(agent.commissionRate)}`}

Leads

{agent.ownedLeads.length}

{/* ── Hierarchy Info ── */}

Reports To

{agent.parent ? (

{agent.parent.name}

{agent.parent.agentCode}

) : (

Top Level Administrator

)}
{/* ── Sub-Agents ── */} {agent.children.length > 0 && (

Downline ({agent.children.length})

{agent.children.map((child) => (
{child.name.charAt(0)}

{child.name}

{child._count.ownedLeads} Leads

{child.isActive ? "ACTIVE" : "OFF"}
))}
)} {/* ── Commission Ledger ── */}

Earnings Ledger

{agent.commissions.length > 0 ? (
{agent.commissions.map((c) => (

Deal Reward

₹{Number(c.amount).toLocaleString("en-IN")}

{c.role} · {c.commissionType === "PERCENTAGE" ? `${Number(c.rate)}%` : `₹${Number(c.rate)}`}

{c.status}

{new Date(c.createdAt).toLocaleDateString("en-IN", { day: "numeric", month: "short" })}

))}
) : (

No earnings recorded yet

)}
) }

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

/home/ratnesh-mishra/Desktop/Agent-Commission-App/src/app/dashboard/agents/hierarchy/graph-view.tsx:80:5
  78 |       }))
  79 |
> 80 |     setIsLayouting(true)
     |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Avoid calling setState() directly within an effect
  81 |
  82 |     getLayoutedElements(initialNodes, initialEdges).then(({ nodes: layoutedNodes, edges: layoutedEdges }) => {
  83 |       setNodes(layoutedNodes)

{/* ── App-style Header ── */}

System Catalog

{productStats.categories} Categories

{/* ── Premium Hero Card ── */}

Solutions Inventory

Explore our complete range of certified solar components and package specifications.

Inventory

{productStats.totalProducts}

Pricing

{formatCurrency(productStats.priceRange.min)} - {formatCurrency(productStats.priceRange.max)}

Tech Stack
TOPCON BIFACIAL HJT
{/* ── Catalog Section ── */}

Specifications

{productCatalog.map((category: ProductCategory, idx: number) => (

{category.category}

{category.supplier}

{category.variants.reduce((sum: number, v: ProductVariant) => sum + v.products.length, 0)} UNITS
{category.variants.map((variant: ProductVariant, vIdx: number) => (

{variant.name}

{variant.description}

{/* Mobile-friendly List instead of Table */}
{variant.products.map((product: Product, pIdx: number) => (
{product.kWp} kWp {product.phase} Phase

{product.qty} × {product.module}W Panels · {product.wire}m Wiring

₹{product.price.toLocaleString("en-IN")}
))}
))}
))}
{/* ── Technical Info Footer ── */}

Technical Glossary

Capacity (kWp)

Kilowatt peak — the maximum potential power output under standard test conditions.

Phase Type

1 Phase (Residential) vs 3 Phase (Commercial/Heavy Loads) electrical architecture.

Module Technology

High-efficiency TopCon or Mono Perc solar panels with varied wattage ratings.

* Note: All prices reflected are base package prices. Statutory GST, delivery logistics, and customized structural modifications are calculated during final checkout.

); }

import { getCommissions } from "@/app/actions/deals" import { auth } from "@/auth" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card" import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table" import { CommissionActions } from "@/app/dashboard/commissions/commission-actions" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { Banknote, IndianRupee, Wallet, Sparkles, Trophy, CheckCircle2, Clock, TrendingUp, Star } from "lucide-react" // Milestones for the happiness progress tracker const MILESTONES = [ { label: "Rising Star", amount: 10000, icon: "⭐" }, { label: "Silver Partner", amount: 50000, icon: "🥈" }, { label: "Gold Partner", amount: 100000, icon: "🥇" }, { label: "Platinum Elite", amount: 500000, icon: "💎" }, ] function getMilestone(earned: number) { const achieved = MILESTONES.filter(m => earned >= m.amount) const next = MILESTONES.find(m => earned < m.amount) const current = achieved[achieved.length - 1] ?? null const progress = next ? Math.min(100, Math.round((earned / next.amount) * 100)) : 100 return { current, next, progress, achieved: achieved.length } } export default async function CommissionsPage() { const session = await auth() const isAgent = session?.user?.role === "AGENT" || session?.user?.role === "SALESPERSON" const isAdmin = session?.user?.role === "ADMIN" const commissions = await getCommissions( !isAdmin && session?.user?.agentId ? { agentId: session.user.agentId } : undefined ) const totalEarnings = commissions.reduce((sum, c) => sum + Number(c.amount), 0) const paidEarnings = commissions.filter(c => c.status === "PAID").reduce((sum, c) => sum + Number(c.amount), 0) const pendingEarnings = commissions.filter(c => c.status !== "PAID").reduce((sum, c) => sum + Number(c.amount), 0) const paidCount = commissions.filter(c => c.status === "PAID").length const { current: currentMilestone, next: nextMilestone, progress, achieved } = getMilestone(paidEarnings) // Group commissions by month for agent ledger const grouped: Record = {} commissions.forEach(c => { const key = new Date(c.createdAt).toLocaleDateString("en-IN", { month: "long", year: "numeric" }) if (!grouped[key]) grouped[key] = [] grouped[key].push(c) }) // ── AGENT / SALESPERSON WALLET VIEW ────────────────────────────────────── if (!isAdmin) { return (
{/* Page title */}

My Earnings

Happiness Wallet

{/* ── Premium Wallet Card ── */}
{/* Decorative glows */}
{/* Chip decoration */}
{/* Card header */}
Arpit Solar · Happiness Wallet
Active
{/* Balance */}

Total Happiness Earned

₹{totalEarnings.toLocaleString("en-IN")}

{currentMilestone && (

{currentMilestone.icon} {currentMilestone.label}

)}
{/* Stats row */}

Paid Out

₹{paidEarnings.toLocaleString("en-IN")}

Pending

₹{pendingEarnings.toLocaleString("en-IN")}

Deals Won

{paidCount}

{/* ── Milestone / Happiness Progress ── */} {nextMilestone && (
Next: {nextMilestone.icon} {nextMilestone.label}
₹{paidEarnings.toLocaleString("en-IN")} / ₹{nextMilestone.amount.toLocaleString("en-IN")}
{/* Progress bar */}

Earn ₹{(nextMilestone.amount - paidEarnings).toLocaleString("en-IN")} more to unlock {nextMilestone.label}

)} {!nextMilestone && achieved === MILESTONES.length && (

💎 Platinum Elite

You've reached the highest tier. Incredible work!

)} {/* ── Transaction Ledger ── */}
Transaction Ledger {commissions.length} records
{commissions.length === 0 ? (

No earnings recorded yet

Your commissions will appear here once deals are closed

) : (
{Object.entries(grouped).map(([month, records]) => { const monthTotal = records.reduce((s, r) => s + Number(r.amount), 0) return (
{/* Month header */}
{month} +₹{monthTotal.toLocaleString("en-IN")}
{/* Transactions */}
{records.map((c) => { const isPaid = c.status === "PAID" const isDisputed = c.status === "DISPUTED" return (
{/* Icon */}
{isPaid ? : isDisputed ? : }
{/* Info */}

{c.deal.lead.name}

{c.role} {new Date(c.createdAt).toLocaleDateString("en-IN", { day: "numeric", month: "short" })}
{/* Amount & status */}

+₹{Number(c.amount).toLocaleString("en-IN")}

) })}
) })}
)}
) } // ── ADMIN VIEW ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const adminPaid = commissions.filter(c => c.status === "PAID").reduce((s, c) => s + Number(c.amount), 0) const adminPending = commissions.filter(c => c.status !== "PAID").reduce((s, c) => s + Number(c.amount), 0) return (
{/* Header */}

Financials

Commissions

Track and manage all agent commissions.

{/* Admin summary tiles */}
Total Records

{commissions.length}

Total Paid Out

₹{adminPaid.toLocaleString("en-IN")}

Pending

₹{adminPending.toLocaleString("en-IN")}

{/* Desktop table */} Agent Lead / Deal Deal Value Role Commission Status Actions {commissions.length === 0 && ( No commission records found. )} {commissions.map((c) => (
{c.agent.name.charAt(0)}
{c.agent.name} {c.agent.agentCode}
{c.deal.lead.name} {c.deal.id.slice(0, 12)}…
₹{Number(c.deal.dealValue).toLocaleString("en-IN")} {c.role} ₹{Number(c.amount).toLocaleString("en-IN")} {c.status} ))}
) }

import { getDealById } from "@/app/actions/deals" import { notFound } from "next/navigation" import Link from "next/link" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { ArrowLeft, FileText, User, IndianRupee, Phone, Mail, MapPin, Calendar, Briefcase, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react" import { DealStatusChanger } from "./status-changer" import { DocumentManager } from "./document-manager" export default async function DealDetailPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) { const { id } = await params const deal = await getDealById(id) if (!deal) notFound() const statusColor: Record = { NEW_QUALIFIED: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400", SITE_VISIT_DONE: "bg-violet-100 text-violet-700 dark:bg-violet-900/30 dark:text-violet-400", PROPOSAL_SENT: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-400", NEGOTIATION: "bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 dark:bg-orange-900/30 dark:text-orange-400", CLOSED_WON: "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-400", CLOSED_LOST: "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400", } return (
{/* ── App-style Header ── */}

{deal.name || "Deal Details"}

{deal.lead.name}

{deal.status.replace(/_/g, " ")}
{/* ── Deal Value Hero Card ── */}

Final Deal Value

₹{Number(deal.dealValue).toLocaleString("en-IN")}

{(deal.originalPrice || deal.discount) && (

Original

₹{deal.originalPrice ? Number(deal.originalPrice).toLocaleString("en-IN") : "-"}

Discount

-₹{deal.discount ? Number(deal.discount).toLocaleString("en-IN") : "0"}

)}
{/* ── Customer Details ── */}

Customer

Name {deal.lead.name}
Phone {deal.lead.contacts?.[0]?.phoneNumber || "-"}
Email {deal.lead.email || "-"}
Location {deal.lead.location || "-"}
Type {deal.lead.customerType || "Unknown"}
{/* ── Deal Info ── */}

Deal Info

Owner {deal.lead.owner?.name || "-"}
Expected Close {deal.expectedCloseDate ? deal.expectedCloseDate.toLocaleDateString("en-IN", { day: "numeric", month: "short", year: "numeric" }) : "-"}
{/* ── Update Status ── */}

Pipeline Stage

{/* ── Documents ── */}

Documents

{/* ── Commissions ── */}

Commission Breakdown

{deal.commissions.length > 0 ? (
{deal.commissions.map((c) => (
{c.agent.name.charAt(0)}

{c.agent.name}

{c.agent.agentCode} · {c.role} · {Number(c.rate)}%

₹{Number(c.amount).toLocaleString("en-IN")}

{c.status}
))}
) : (

Commissions calculated when deal is "CLOSED WON"

)}
{/* ── Notes ── */} {deal.notes && (

Internal Notes

{deal.notes}

)}
) }
